title: Kolaikaara Lyrics Thambi Vettothi Sundaram Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Songs: Kolaikaara Analacchu Emoochu
Singers: Karthik & Kalyani
Lyrics: Vairamuthu

Kolaikaara, Analaacchu, Emoochu
Puthimaari poyaachu, ada Kolaikaara ...
Kolakaari, unna paathu usur pochu
ninnupoachu emmoochu, adi kolakaari..
Un madiyil seeraatu, En manasa thalaatu
Andha alaimel paaipottu en azjaga neeraatu..

Kolaikaara, Analaacchu, Emoochu
Puthimaari poyaachu, ada Kolaikaara ...

Paalum sorum ungaama, pacha thanni sellaama
Ithu ithu poneney echi mutham ilaama
Nijam kanni thaangaama, rendu kannum thoongaama
Kattil sugam kaangaama, kaamam seiyum naataama

Panjillaama thee illaama patha vacha kalli
puthikulla kathi veesi povadhenna thalli
Pacha vaala thoppukulla, pandhi vaika vaadi pulla
Pal pazham koodakulla pathiyamum thevailla
Kolakaari.... ye hey .....

Naanjil naatu kadal ellaam, unna kandu vala veesum
Sangu muthu ellaaame, thanga kaala vela pesum
Ora kara ellaame otti kollum meenvaasam
Unna mattum thottaale maasam ellaam poovaasam
Pathi kolai senjiputtu thappi sellum mooda
Muthamittu moththathayum konnuputtu poda

Aasa vacha pomalaiku anju naala thokkamilla
Meesa vacha aamabalaku metha vaanga neramilla

Kolakaari, unna paathu usur pochu
ninnupoachu emmoochu, adi kolakaari..
Kolaikaara, Analaacchu, Emoochu
Puthimaari poyaachu, ada Kolaikaara ...

Un madiyil seeraatu, En manasa thalaatu
Andha alaimel paaipottu en azjaga neeraatu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kolaikaara?

The song captures themes of love and longing, expressed through poetic lyrics and a soothing melody.

Who are the singers of Kolaikaara?

The song is sung by Kalyani and Karthik.

Who composed the music for Thambi Vettothi Sundaram?

The music was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was Thambi Vettothi Sundaram released?

The movie was released in 2011.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song enhances the emotional depth of the film, highlighting the romantic tension between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Set against the backdrop of the movie Thambi Vettothi Sundaram, the song Kolaikaara is a poignant expression of love and yearning. Sung by Kalyani and Karthik, the duet captures the emotional turmoil and longing between the protagonists. Vairamuthu's lyrics beautifully convey the depth of emotions, while Vidyasagar's melody adds a soothing yet melancholic touch. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kolaikaara from Thambi Vettothi Sundaram is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Kalyani and Karthik, and the poetic brilliance of Vairamuthu, this song is a standout piece. Vidyasagar's enchanting melody adds depth, making it a must-listen for romantic music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Movie: Thambi Vettothi Sundaram Music: Vidyasagar

The killer, the fire is gone, the breath is lost, oh killer... Killer girl, seeing you, my life stopped, my breath paused, oh killer girl... Resting on your lap, my heart sways, on the waves, my beauty floats...
The killer, the fire is gone, the breath is lost, oh killer...
Milk and rice from your mother, without drinking water, I came here without a kiss... The truth can't bear it, eyes can't sleep, can't see the comfort of the bed, the desire is like a play...

Without a spark, without fire, the stone is placed, the knife is thrown, what is this distance... In the green field, to place the pig, oh girl, in the fruit basket, no need for a diet... Killer girl... hey...

The sea of Nanjil country, seeing you, casts a net... All the conch and pearls, speak of golden times... All the shores are filled with the smell of fish... Just touching you, every month smells like flowers... After committing half a murder, escaping in a fog... Kissing and killing everything...
The girl with desires hasn't slept for five days... The man with a mustache doesn't have time to rest...
Killer girl, seeing you, my life stopped, my breath paused, oh killer girl... The killer, the fire is gone, the breath is lost, oh killer...
Resting on your lap, my heart sways, on the waves, my beauty floats...
